title: LeadFormSplitSection
description: Lead capture band: light-grey section with a centered eyebrow + heading over the shared LeadForm split (value rail + trust badges beside the form card). The form logic, fields, spam defense, and /api/lead contract live in components/forms/LeadForm; this section only supplies the band chrome and LeadForm's copy props. This file is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the section's shape - the TS type is generated from it (LeadFormSplit.types.ts) and the landing-page doc schema $refs it.

formId.description: Funnel id recorded with the lead. Must be one of LeadForm's typed funnels (the /api/lead contract).

eyebrow.description: Neon-outline pill above the band heading, e.g. 'Talk to us'.

heading.description: Centered band heading, e.g. 'Questions, quotes, or bulk orders'.

railEyebrow.description: LeadForm's charcoal rail pill. Defaults inside LeadForm.

headline.description: LeadForm's rail headline. Defaults inside LeadForm.

lead.description: LeadForm's rail lead copy. Defaults inside LeadForm.

submitLabel.description: Submit button label. Defaults inside LeadForm.
